planDoc: docs/plans/2026-04-13-team-x-phase-5-intelligence-layer.md (M34 row §9; M34 implementation plan to be authored at T0)
title: Write M34 plan doc — Copilot UI
predecessor: M33-T10 shipped 2026-04-17 (commit 2fc998e). All 11 M33 tasks complete. 1099 unit tests / 9 E2E spec files / 10 Playwright cases green. M33 folded into orchestrator history.
goal: Author docs/plans/2026-04-17-team-x-phase-5-m34-copilot-ui.md as the M34 implementation plan. Mirror the M33 plan doc's structural template (T0 = plan doc, then T1..T9 implementation tasks, T10 = docs + verification + milestone marker). Per Phase 5 design §9 M34 row deliverables: sidebar panel (toggle, insight cards with category + severity color coding, action dispatch button per insight, dismiss button, free-form ask input that calls copilot.ask), dashboard widget (top 3 insights + 'view all' link), Cmd+Shift+K shortcut wired through the M30 palette to open/focus the Copilot sidebar. M34 is renderer-only — consumes the M33 copilot.* IPC surface + 4 bus events (copilot.insight / copilot.analyzed / copilot.dismissed / copilot.expired). No new IPC, no new bus events, no new providers, no new migrations. Step-stream attachment reuses M31's useAgentStepStream + M32 T0's getRunSnapshot backfill pattern (M33 T6 wire-contract stability lets this work without changes).
acceptance: NEW docs/plans/2026-04-17-team-x-phase-5-m34-copilot-ui.md — F10-quality plan doc mirroring M33 plan doc structure (Overview, What ships, Invariants preserved, Success criteria, Task breakdown T0–T10, Risks + open questions, Handoff notes for next session). Each task has scope + commit template + tests delta + ledger follow-up step.
Atomic commit: feat(m34): M34 T0 — plan doc.

Ledger commit: chore(loki): M34 T0 — commit ledger (<sha>) — promote T0 commit into orchestrator inFlightMilestone, seed T1 head-of-queue in pending.json, append M34 T0 DONE subsection to .loki/CONTINUITY.md.
carryForward: M33 architectural seams (three-tier canned test seam now four-member quartet, pause-aware providerRouter wrapper, AbortController stop, is_system + filter-sweep with isSystemRoleId predicate, atomic + ledger commit cadence, ABI rebuild dance, IPC-mutation-emits-bus-event invariant #11) all carry forward unchanged.
Copilot wire contract: copilot.ask returns { runId, threadId } matching M31 complex_request — M34 sidebar attaches step-stream via useAgentStepStream without a second wire format.

M33 follow-ups F3 + F4 are deferred and DO NOT block M34. F3 (CopilotEventWindow.clear unwired) awaits a companies.archive IPC. F4 (backup/restore needs post-restore system-copilot bootstrap) is a M34+ candidate but not on the M34 critical path.
